transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/qL9r7KBZkonxc13Y2SpNFd3wq46sCz4m

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (56 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

To explore SMB's services for scaling Reagan Butts' law firm.

Key Takeaways

The Firm: Reagan Butts' firm, over a year old, is at capacity but has unpredictable revenue ($500k in year one, targeting $650k–$750k this year) from a 95%+ word-of-mouth pipeline.

The Problem: Unpredictable client flow ("feast or famine") prevents strategic hiring and financial planning, creating a key growth bottleneck.

The Goal: Build a predictable client acquisition system to scale to a 3–5 attorney, $2–3M boutique firm focused on commercial litigation and transactional work.

The Proposal: A 3-part plan: 1) a clear growth plan, 2) organic social media via an AI video avatar, and 3) a targeted paid ad strategy.

Topics

Current State & Growth Constraints

Firm Profile:

Focus: Commercial litigation (60%) and transactional work (40%), with an oil & gas emphasis.

Revenue: $500k in year one (ended June 2026); targeting $650k–$750k for this year.

Team: 1 W-2 attorney (Reagan Butts), 1 W-2 support staff, 2 contract attorneys, 2 contract paralegals.

Primary Constraint → Unpredictable Client Flow:

Source: 95%+ of clients come from word-of-mouth referrals.

Result: "Feast or famine" new matter acquisition (0–6/month), making financial projections and hiring decisions difficult.

Impact: Hiring is reactive (out of necessity) instead of proactive (from a position of strength).

Secondary Constraint → Lack of Scalable Systems:

Goal: Implement scalable intake processes to handle increased lead volume without sacrificing client service.

Rationale: Reagan Butts prioritizes a "white glove" client experience and wants to avoid losing leads to slow response times.

Long-Term Vision & Growth Strategy

3-Year Goal: A close-knit, boutique firm with 3–5 attorneys and 3+ support staff.

Revenue Target: $2–3M annually, based on the SMB framework of ~$250k revenue per employee.

Client Profile: Primarily Texas-based (Midland, Dallas), with a need to expand into Houston.

Current Marketing:

Business Development: Personal networking (lunches, meet-and-greets).

SEO: Low-cost local service ($250/mo).

Paid Ads: Evaluating a local agency's proposal for a $10k/mo campaign (70% Google, 30% LinkedIn) targeting 4–6 leads/mo.

Note: Jonathan Farace advised a conservative 10–15% conversion rate for cold leads, which would yield only 1 client per month.

Proposed Solution: A 3-Part Roadmap

1. Clear Growth Plan: Develop a step-by-step roadmap with quarterly and monthly targets to guide all growth initiatives.

2. Organic Social Media: Implement a consistent content strategy using an AI video avatar.

Rationale: Builds authority and credibility online without requiring significant time from Reagan Butts, who is already working 50–60 hours/week.

3. Targeted Paid Ad Strategy: Run a paid ad campaign to generate predictable, high-value leads.

Rationale: Provides a consistent client acquisition channel to stabilize revenue and enable strategic hiring.

Next Steps

Jonathan Farace: Send calendar invite for the next meeting and a recap email.

Jonathan Farace: Prepare a detailed proposal for the 3-part roadmap, including a customized plan and pricing, for the next meeting.

Reagan Butts & Jonathan Farace: Meet to review the proposal on Wednesday, July 30th, at 12:45 PM Central Time.

Action Items

Email Reagan recap + calendar invite for Wed 12:45 CT/1:45 ET; request additions - WATCH (5 secs)
Prepare customized plan for Reagan for Wed call: coaching, AI avatar, paid ads, intake, pricing - WATCH (5 secs)
